content: Hook events: SessionStart, SessionEnd, Stop, UserPromptSubmit, PreToolUse, PostToolUse, PreCompact. Hooks configured in .claude/settings.local.json under 'hooks' key. Each hook has matcher (tool name or empty) and hooks array with type:command entries. Session hooks are ephemeral in-memory callbacks in src/utils/hooks/sessionHooks.ts.

name: Lifecycle Hooks
description: Hooks in .claude/settings.local.json support events: SessionStart, UserPromptSubmit, PreToolUse, PostToolUse, Stop, SessionEnd. Hooks return additionalContext JSON to inject into conversation. Commands run in shell, can block operations.
